name: Does workers comp cover long-term meds for COPD from factory dust?

mainEntity.name: Does workers comp cover long-term meds for COPD from factory dust?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, lifetime medical for proven work-related COPD[2].
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, workers' comp covers ongoing medical treatment, including inhalers and oxygen for occupational COPD if work-related. Lifetime benefits apply for necessary care proven by doctors[2][5]. No cap on medical in most states. - Annual reviews ensure relevance. - Disputes resolved via independent exams. Keep seeing approved doctors and document needs to maintain coverage.

description: Yes, lifetime medical for proven work-related COPD[2].
